text:
There once was a lonely old farmer who lived in a cabin on the edge of a small town. His fields were barren and harvests were sparse because no one visited him. On one gray, dreary afternoon, a young couple driving by spotted the lonely house from the road. They felt a pang of empathy and decided to stop.

As they drove up, the hitching of the horse drew the old man's curious gaze. They paused for a moment, extending a small basket and a few coins.

"You must be hungry," the woman said gently. "Come out and eat with us."

Without hesitation, the farmer climbed out of his rickety buggy. The couple took him to their cozy kitchen where they prepared a meal fit for a king. The aroma made him forget all his sorrow.

"Toothaches?" the woman asked sympathetically.

A faint smile crept over his face.

"Just a little. Wouldn't want to ruin your beautiful day."

They laughed as the couple shared stories and
